base_url.description: OpenList base URL, for example https://pan.example.com

root_path.description: Root path exposed to the bot

max_list_items.description: Max items shown in chat for one list command

browse_whitelist_only.description: Only allow browse commands for whitelisted users

upload_whitelist_only.description: Only allow upload commands for whitelisted users

browse_user_ids.description: Browse whitelist QQ numbers, split by comma or space

upload_user_ids.description: Upload whitelist QQ numbers, split by comma or space

admin_user_ids.description: Plugin admin QQ numbers, these users bypass limits

authorization_code.description: Optional self-service authorization code, empty disables it
